key_components: attachment-validation: File size (25MB) and MIME type validation with error messages
useAttachments: React hook for attachment state management
AttachmentButton: Paperclip icon button with disabled state matching Send conditions
AttachmentPreviewStrip: Multi-attachment preview with thumbnails, file info, remove buttons
blob-storage-handlers: IPC handlers for renderer-side blob storage access
system:show-open-dialog: IPC handler for native file picker dialog

AC-001.evidence: AttachmentButton component with paperclip icon, disabled when no identity/contact selected (matches Send button conditions)
AC-001.test_coverage: Disabled state logic verified via ConversationPane integration

AC-002.evidence: Drag-and-drop support with visual overlay in ConversationPane

AC-003.evidence: AttachmentPreviewStrip renders thumbnails for images, MIME icons for others, file name and size
AC-003.test_coverage: Component renders previews with metadata display

AC-004.evidence: Multiple attachments supported with horizontal scroll in preview strip, each with independent remove button

AC-006.evidence: validateAttachment rejects files >25MB with descriptive error message
AC-006.test_coverage: attachment-validation.test.ts: 7 size validation tests + 3 property-based tests

AC-007.evidence: validateAttachment rejects unsupported MIME types, supports images (JPEG/PNG/GIF/WebP), video (MP4/WebM), audio (MP3/OGG/WAV), documents (PDF)
AC-007.test_coverage: attachment-validation.test.ts: 10 MIME type tests + property-based tests

VQ-05-DEAD.detail: AttachmentPreviewStrip imports from non-existent ../../theme/theme-utils; should be ../../themes/ThemeContext

VQ-05-INT.detail: No integration test validates the complete file validation pipeline

fixes.fix: Changed import in AttachmentPreviewStrip.tsx from '../../theme/theme-utils' to '../../themes/ThemeContext'
Added integration test 'should correctly validate a batch of mixed files through the full pipeline' in attachment-validation.test.ts
